stringtable.string: Choose the difficulty you want to play at.
You have choosen the easy option. Don't you think you making it a bit too easy?
You play at the normal difficulty. This is a resonable choice. Have fun while playing.
You want a little challenge and play at higher difficulty. If you insist...
Wouldn't you rather consider going to therapy? So much self-hate is not healthy...
The host is choosing the difficulty. Please wait patiently...
The host has selected easy difficulty. Prepare to be bored out of your mind!
The host has selected normal difficulty. You will feel well entertained, but don't expect a challenge!
The host has selected hard difficulty. The enemies are tough and you will have to do a little to win!
The host has selected maniac difficulty. You can thank them for that, because it won't be easy!
